description.overview: Border Collies are considered the most intelligent dog breed. They were developed for herding sheep and have incredible work ethic and energy.
description.temperament: Border Collies are intensely focused and work-driven. They need mental and physical challenges. May try to herd children and pets.
description.health: Generally healthy but prone to hip dysplasia, epilepsy, and eye problems. CEA testing recommended.
description.exercise: Extremely high exercise and mental stimulation needs. Need jobs to do. Excel at all dog sports.

best_for: Those who can provide mental challenges
verdict.summary: The Einstein of dogs. Border Collies are brilliant but demanding—they need hours of activity and mental stimulation daily. Best for experienced, active owners. Will become destructive if bored.
